positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a celestial nebula intertwined with delicate botanical elements, forming a cohesive, symmetrical mandala pattern. The core subject is a swirling blend of deep sapphire blue, cosmic violet, and shimmering emerald green, contrasted by fine gold leaf accents. Integrate stylized renderings of crescent moons, shooting stars, and various geometric floral shapes (like stylized lotuses and arabesques). The composition must be perfectly centered, emphasizing strong silhouettes and high contrast suitable for screen printing on fabric. The style should be ethereal, highly decorative, and graphically clean, with sharp edges and rich gradients. Full symmetry is mandatory. Studio quality, vector art aesthetic, dramatic backlighting, hyper-detailed linework, high contrast, pop art influence.
negative: lowres, blurry, deformed, artifacts, noise, text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, muted colors, photographic, photo-realistic
